steps: This is a misconception: Rangers in D&D 2024 ARE spellcasters.
At level 1, Rangers can prepare spells equal to their Wisdom modifier + half their Ranger level (rounded up).
A typical level 1 Ranger with Wisdom 14 (+2 modifier) can prepare 2 spells from the Ranger spell list.
Rangers also gain cantrips at level 1.
Example cantrips: Prestidigitation, Mending. Example prepared spells: Hunter's Mark, Goodberry.
